description: Create a 'Build vs. Buy' investment decision tree diagram in EdrawMax. The diagram must feature a square root decision node labeled 'Strategy' with two primary branches: 'Build In-house' and 'Buy Vendor Sol.', each terminating in a circular chance node. The 'Build In-house' path must branch into 'Success (60%)' with an outcome of '$50,000' and 'Failure (40%)' with an outcome of '$120,000'. The 'Buy Vendor Sol.' path must branch into 'Compatible (90%)' with an outcome of '$80,000' and 'Incompatible (10%)' with an outcome of '$150,000'. Ensure all text labels are visible. Save the diagram as '/home/ga/Documents/build_vs_buy_tree.eddx' and export it as '/home/ga/Documents/build_vs_buy_tree.png'.
